---
title: 'Contact Us'
date: '2018-03-05T05:23:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'The Playground, LLC'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '1591035059697162785'
blogger_filename: '/p/contact.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Playground, LLC/feed.atom'
---

The Playground, LLC is in Pre-Launch phase at this time.<br />
<br />
If you'd like to reach us for any reason, you may contact us at:<br />
<br />
Darrell &amp; Flavia Wolfe<br />
9030 N Hess St, #564<br />
Hayden, ID 83835<br />
<br />
208-907-1617<br />
<br />
<a href="mailto:Me@DarrellWolfe.com">Me@DarrellWolfe.com</a><br />
<br />
<a href="https://www.facebook.com/ThePlaygroundLLC/">Facebook.com/ThePlaygroundLLC</a><br />
<br />
<a href="https://theplaygroundllc.blogspot.com/">https://theplaygroundllc.blogspot.com/</a><br />
<br />
To help fund our startup:<br />
<ul>
<li><a href="https://www.gofundme.com/theplaygroundllc" target="_blank">GoFundMe</a></li>
</ul>
<br />
Thank you for stopping by!<br />
<div>
<br /></div>
